title: croton russulus
intro: Croton russulus, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of its active compounds, such as ursolic acid and oleanolic acid. The health benefits of Croton russulus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, capsules, or extracts, and is also used topically as a paste or salve to aid in wound care and skin issues.
